full_text:
Zhang Zun (Ziming) 張臶 (子明)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Zun (張臶), styledZiming (子明), was born in Julu. A much admired teacher who rejected offers by Yuan Shao, Gao Gan and Cao Cao to serve them. Zhang Zun lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
